---
title: "Call for Papers"
---

We invite submissions for the **TAIH Symposium 2026**. We welcome contributions from researchers and practitioners across academia and industry who are exploring the intersection of artificial intelligence and domain-specific challenges.

## Important Dates

* **Submission deadline:** May 5, 2026 11:59 PM MDT
* **Author notification:** May 17, 2026, 11:59 PM MDT
* **Camera-ready deadline:** May 22, 2026, 11:59 PM MDT


## Topics of Interest

We welcome a broad spectrum of research on transdisciplinary efforts in development and use of AI. Examples are:

* AI in healthcare and medicine
* AI in critical infrastructure and energy
* Human-AI interaction and collaboration
* Ethical, governance, and societal implications of AI
* Transdisciplinary case studies and real-world applications
* Trustworthy ML foundations (explainability, interpretability, fairness, robustness, etc.)

## Submission Guidelines

We use a flexible, one-page format to make joining the conversation easy for all researchers.

### What to Submit

* **Length:** 1 page, plus references.
* **Format:** Flexible. You may submit an extended abstract, preliminary results, or a summary of recently published or previously presented work.
* **Template:** Standard single-column or double-column academic format (e.g., IEEE, ACM, or standard LaTeX article). PDF format is required.
* **Review Process:** All submissions will be peer-reviewed in a **double-blind process**. Please ensure your submitted PDF does not contain author names or affiliations.

### Presentation Format
Upon acceptance, authors will be invited to present their research at the symposium's **Poster Session**.

* The physical poster should reflect the core concepts of the submitted abstract, but authors are encouraged to include any additional details, figures, and updates.
* **Top Submissions:** The authors of the top three accepted papers will be invited to present their work during the main plenary session, in addition to their poster.

::: {.text-center style="margin-top: 40px;"}
[Submit on OpenReview](https://openreview.net/group?id=TAIH/2026/Symposium){.btn .btn-success .btn-lg role="button" target="_blank"}
:::
